creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
It's been ages and I had a bit of time when I couldn't concentrate much so I started to cleanup old work spaces...

Please check this review (there is a link there also for a full drop-in file-replacement).  As you can see on the comments of the review I had started this last year for a quick test.. and it could be improved.   Maybe one of you has time or interest in this.  It seems to be holding up though.

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D31077
